stage2_category_type_label: $Image title: Low shelf play ideas by age for 13–15 months $Description: A small rotation of toys on a low shelf — chunky books, stacking cups and soft animals — makes it easy to browse what fits this age when you’ve got a minute.

$Image title: Baby walker for first steps for 10–12 months $Description: A sturdy push-along baby walker can help when standing and early steps are just beginning. Useful nearby if a neighbour is passing one on at the right time.

$Image title: Christmas gift ideas for 13–15 months $Description: A short Christmas gift list for this age — board books, simple wooden toys and one or two wraps family can choose from — so relatives buy useful, not random.

$Image title: First day at nursery settle kit for 13–15 months $Description: A nursery bag with spare clothes, a comfort teddy and a familiar cup helps the settling weeks feel more ordinary when nursery is about to start.

$Image title: White noise machine ready to pass on for 7–9 months $Description: A white noise or sleep machine that has done its job can help another local baby settle. Pass it on when nights are quieter and cupboard space is worth more.
